en.extract:
The yellow-chinned sunbird (Anthreptes rectirostris) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae.
It is found in West Africa, namely Sierra Leone to Ghana. The grey-chinned sunbird (Anthreptes tephrolaemus) was formerly grouped with this species.

The '''yellow-chinned sunbird''' ('''''Anthreptes rectirostris''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Nectariniidae]].
It is found in [[West Africa]], namely [[Sierra Leone]] to [[Ghana]]. The [[grey-chinned sunbird]] (''Anthreptes tephrolaemus'') was formerly grouped with this species.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Species Updates – IOC World Bird List|url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/updates/species-updates/|access-date=2021-05-27|language=en-US}}</ref>
